data.body: EPIC CLOSED. yogic-hexametric-ox (cc4d) + all 9 stories closed with signed completion attestations. All work landed on origin/main via Gerrit: 12 changes total (9 epic: 598-606; 3 completion-remediation: 621-623; 1 sequencing fix: 625). Journey through the gates involved: FFO rebase-races under fast-moving main, 2 CI flakes rechecked past (606 import-benchmark git-tree race, 622 graph-perf timing), and completion-verifier AC-letter remediation (it reads the landed main checkout, so land-then-close). DONE.
